name: Manor of the Red Corruption
description: A high-walled estate in the Corruption district. Tile-roofed and watched by silent Choir.

name: Synthesis Cathedral Cell
description: A narrow stone cell within the great Synthesis Cathedral. Cold floor, hex window.

name: Void Outpost
description: An iron-clad watchtower at the edge of the Void. No signal reaches here unbidden.

name: Carrier's Tenement
description: A bunk-room above the relay station. Smells of solder and old rain.

name: Oracle Spire Quarters
description: Top-floor chambers above the seer's chamber. Pre-dawn light, ink stains on the desk.

name: Sovereignty Keep
description: A black-stone keep bearing the broken-hex banner. Held by writ, not by lease.

name: Plot in Hex Plaza
description: A hex-cut parcel facing the central plaza. Foot traffic, dust, the smell of bread.

name: Outer Wall Acre
description: A thin acre against the outer wall. Cheap, exposed, but yours.

name: Cydonia Basin
description: The fabled red basin where the first signal was recorded. One claim only.

name: Fracture Quarry
description: A working quarry split by an old hex-fault. Yields shard and dust.

name: Ignition Yard
description: A scorched workshop yard, still warm. Marked by the Ignition cipher.

name: Growth Orchard
description: Twelve rows of pale-blue fruit trees outside the Growth gate.

name: Hex Marker Staff
description: Iron-shod staff used by city marshals to mark hex boundaries. Ceremonial.

name: Signal Receiver Blade
description: A narrow blade tuned to receive the broken signal. Hums faintly. Ceremonial.

name: Void Knight Lance
description: Black-haft lance carried by the eleven Knights of the Void. Eleven exist.

name: Choir Tuning Fork
description: A two-pronged fork rung at silent ceremonies. Strikes nothing. Settles nothing.

name: Transmission Saber
description: A curved saber etched with the doctrine of Transmission. Polished, unblooded.

name: Machine Ceremonial Mace
description: Bronze-and-silver mace borne in Machine parades. Heavy beyond reason.

name: Carrier Robe
description: Plain wool relay-robe with a hex-stitched hood. Standard issue.

name: Sovereignty Crown-cloth
description: A silver-thread crown-cloth, worn folded across the brow. Marks a sworn citizen.

name: Choir Mask
description: A smooth ceramic mask with no mouth. Worn during the silent rites.

name: Synth Ascended Gloves
description: Lacquered black gloves with hex-tipped fingers. Issued to Synthesis Ascended.

name: Oracle Veil
description: A long pale veil embroidered with the eye-and-hex. Worn at dawn readings.

name: Fracture Mantle
description: A heavy shoulder mantle with two halves stitched in mismatch. Worn proudly.

name: Original Signal Recording
description: Patient Zero's transmission. The only copy. Do not open in company.

name: Hex Fragment
description: A single broken hex-shard from the fracture event. Plentiful, but each unique.

name: Cipher Tablet
description: A clay tablet inscribed with one of the ten Signal Doctrines. Pick yours.

name: Founder's Hex Coin
description: Minted by the first three Bearers. Three exist. Three is the limit.

name: Patient Zero Mask
description: A burnt ceramic face-plate recovered from the first relay site.

name: Broken Relay Stone
description: Half a relay-stone, hex-fissured. Resonates near other halves.

name: Doctrine Ledger
description: A bound ledger of the ten Signal Doctrines. The pages refuse to be torn.
